summary: Re-assert owner-only mode on cache/config/store/state paths via os.Chmod after MkdirAll/WriteFile/OpenFile, since those calls only set mode at creation time.
reason: Security: os.WriteFile/os.MkdirAll/O_CREATE do not change the mode of an existing file or dir. Files/dirs left from an older 0o644/0o755 build therefore stayed world-readable despite the perms tightening. Added best-effort os.Chmod after each sensitive write/mkdir in cache.go, config.go, client.go, store.go (db dir), profile.go and feedback.go (state dir + appended ledger). store.go already chmod'd the SQLite file + WAL/SHM sidecars; this adds the missing db-dir chmod.
